title: Paid booked invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of unpaid booked invoices.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all booked and unpaid invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

invoiceCount.description: The number of unpaid booked invoices.

maxDate.description: The latest date of any unpaid and booked invoice.

minDate.description: The earliest date of any unpaid and booked invoice.

grossRemainderInBaseCurrency.description: The gross total remaining to be paid on the booked unpaid invoices.

customers.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid customer resource.

accountingYears.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid accounting years resource.

periods.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid periods resource.

employees.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid employees resource.

overdue.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid overdue resource.

notOverdue.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue resource.

self.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid resource.
